info.title: openapi2http
info.description: Convert OpenAPI specifications to .http files for testing

options.name: --source
options.description: OpenAPI source (file path or HTTP/HTTPS URL)

options.name: --file
options.description: Input OpenAPI file path (use --source for URLs)

options.name: --endpoint
options.description: Base URL for the API endpoint (overrides servers in spec)

options.name: --output
options.description: Output .http file (defaults to generated name based on source)

options.name: --ignore
options.description: Ignore validation errors and generate the .http file anyway
